title: pilea subintegerrima
intro: Pilea subintegerrima, also known as the Nepal File Plant or Nepalese Aluminum Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Pilea subintegerrima include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
